item.title: TikiTakaConnor: Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 2min Arteta on the players battling a physical strain: “Yes, but when I see them track bac
item.description: Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 2min Arteta on the players battling a physical strain: “Yes, but when I see them track back, when we lose the ball and the habits that they have, it's just amazing. That's why I know what they are doing, these players. There is a reason why we are the only English team in the Mostrar más 1 2 11 394
